name: rabbit-decompose
summary: Interactive feature-decomposition skill. Given a high-level spec (greenfield scenario) or a codebase (existing-code scenario), proposes a list of features for the user to review, edit, and accept; then orchestrates rabbit-feature-scaffold plus a direct rabbit-spec-creator subagent dispatch per accepted feature.
deprecation_criterion: when Claude Code exposes native feature-decomposition assistance that supersedes this skill
